title: The Role of Metadata in a Data Warehouse
description: A diagram showing the three types of metadata and their relationships to the core components of a data warehouse.
relationships: Business Metadata describes data for end-users and is linked to End-User Tools
Technical Metadata defines data structures and is used by ETL Processes and Data Warehouse Storage
Operational Metadata tracks ETL job history and data lineage, connecting Data Sources, ETL Processes, and Storage
